services.name: Game
services.description: Bracket submission, match-result settlement, leaderboards, syndicates, and Verified-Pundit endpoints.

services.name: Identity
services.description: Authentication, humanness score, and account-link endpoints used across the platform.

services.name: VStamp
services.description: On-chain Merkle-signed prediction receipts. Stamp a bracket, verify a stamp.

services.name: Affiliate Router
services.description: Geo-gated affiliate-code resolution and click audit for Polymarket, sportsbook, and pay-TV partners.

services.name: Drips Bridge
services.description: Bridge to the Drips Network for contributor revenue splits.

services.name: Clip Pipeline
services.description: Public read endpoints for clip render status and outputs.

services.name: Odds Ingest
services.description: Public odds-snapshot endpoints sourced from Polymarket and The Odds API.

services.name: WC2026 Data
services.description: Public read-only fixture and team data for the FIFA World Cup 2026 tournament.

services.name: Umbrella API
services.description: The umbrella tournamental.com API surface, health, version, and cross-service composites.
